metadata.note: Hand-crafted fixture for the README hero screenshot. Populates Recents with several plausible coding-agent threads and gives the primary thread a short, realistic transcript. Not derived from a live capture — edit by hand.

result.title: Migrate auth from JWT to session cookies
result.summary: Cut over the web app to first-party session cookies and retire the JWT middleware.

result.title: Fix flaky messaging E2E suite
result.summary: Two specs intermittently time out on CI; reproduce locally and stabilize.

result.title: Add Telegram polling backoff
result.summary: Implement exponential backoff for getUpdates on rate-limit errors.

result.title: Investigate slow startup CPU profile
result.summary: Profile cold-start; renderer eats 1.2s before first paint.

result.title: Refactor approval gate state machine
result.summary: Collapse the queued / pending / applying transitions into one reducer.

result.title: Wire ship-changelog window
result.summary: Surface release notes inside the app on update.

entries.text: Let's plan the JWT → session cookie cutover. The middleware lives in `apps/web/src/middleware/auth.ts` and the JWT verification runs on every request.

Here's the plan:

1. Add a `session_cookies` table with a CSRF secret per session.
2. Stand up a `withSession()` middleware behind a feature flag.
3. Mirror writes to both stores during the rollout window.
4. Cut reads to the new store; verify error rates flat.
5. Retire the JWT middleware and the `jsonwebtoken` dep.

Want me to start with the migration and the middleware in parallel?
Yes — keep both paths live for the first week.
